hero_lede: UK importer, manufacturing partner, and foodservice distributor for authentic East Asian ingredients. 30+ heritage brands, a family farm in Thailand, and 3,000+ product lines in stock.
story_lead: Founded in 1989 by Jimmy Chua, Chuanglee is today led by siblings Christopher, Jennisa and Katriya — a family rooted in food, in trade, and in the long, patient work of building real partnerships on both sides of the world.
story_quote: Partnerships sit at the very core of what we do. We don't just import ingredients — we import the people, the recipes, and the standards behind them.
cap_4_title: Manufactured to your recipe in Thailand.
cap_5_title: Suree's Farm — fresh Thai herbs grown by our family.
eco_1_desc: Long-term supplier relationships across Thailand and Asia.
eco_2_desc: Global expertise for private label and foodservice products.
eco_3_desc: Scalable sauces and ready-to-use components, tailored to recipe.
eco_4_desc: UK import management, consolidation and supply planning.
eco_5_desc: Ambient, chilled, frozen and fresh — across London and nationwide.
farm_home_p: One hour outside Bangkok, our family farm and packing house grows organic Thai produce alongside trusted local farmers — packed to order, flown to the UK weekly.
farm_home_quote: Family farms it, family packs it, family delivers it.
tl_1_event: Chuanglee founded by Jimmy Chua. Begins importing East Asian ingredients into the UK.
tl_2_event: Chuanglee Cash & Carry acquired — expanding wholesale reach.
tl_3_event: Joins NRF Group; acquires Chinese foodservice business — full ecosystem formed.
tl_4_event: First Mini C Asian Pantry retail store opens in Greenwich, London.
tl_5_event: Multi-site ordering app launches. Revenue reaches £25M with 450+ customers.
tl_6_event: The next generation continues the work — same family, same standards.
